name: Request an Extension for Maropost Commerce Trial Webstores
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Steps"}], "data-id": "steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log in to the Maropost Commerce "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fpartners%2Fs%2F", "children": [{"text": "partner portal"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Stores", "bold": true}, {"text": " page within the Partner Tools portal lists all the trials created through the Partner Portal and their trial period. Click on the "}, {"text": "Store Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " of the store due to expire."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Username", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Password", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within the Tool bar, the number of days left in the customer's trial is displayed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To request a trial extension, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/partner-portal/contact-support", "children": [{"text": "send an email request to the Maropost Commerce Partner Support team"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Result"}], "data-id": "result"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have successfully requested a further extension of a Maropost Commerce Trial webstore."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Related Articles"}], "data-id": "related-articles"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/control-panel-management#control-panel", "children": [{"text": "Understand the Maropost Commerce Control Panel"}]}]}]}]}]
